auth_error_contact_admin: If this problem persists, contact your vault administrator.
auth_error_return_prompt: Please return to the vault login page and try again.
dashboard_no_data: No dashboard data available yet. Stats will appear once the platform has been running.
dashboard_page_description: Live platform statistics for Polyphony — federated choral music sharing.
dashboard_subtitle: Live statistics for the Polyphony network
deploy_coming_soon_desc: One-click Vault deployment is under development. For now, technical users can self-host using our open-source code.
deploy_feature_events_desc: Schedule rehearsals, concerts, festivals. Track attendance and RSVPs.
deploy_feature_members_desc: Invite members, assign voice parts, manage roles and permissions.
deploy_feature_privacy_desc: Your data stays in your Vault. Share only what you choose.
deploy_feature_scores_desc: Upload and organize your choir's music collection with PDF support.
deploy_page_description: Deploy your own Polyphony Vault for your choir.
deploy_subtitle: Deploy your choir's own Polyphony Vault in minutes.
directory_page_description: Browse choirs and ensembles using Polyphony.
landing_feature_events_detail: Schedule rehearsals and concerts, track RSVPs and attendance
landing_feature_members_detail: Invite singers by email, assign roles from owner to section leader
landing_feature_scores_detail: Upload PDFs, organize by composer, season, or voice part
landing_feature_umbrella_detail: Coordinate affiliated ensembles under one national or regional body
landing_find_desc: Browse the directory of registered ensembles using Polyphony.
landing_footer_tagline: Open source · Privacy-first · Built for ensembles
landing_page_description: A federated platform for choirs to manage and share their music libraries securely within trusted circles.
landing_register_desc: Start your ensemble's own space — manage your library, members, and events. Free.
landing_subtitle: Manage your ensemble's scores, members, and rehearsals — all in one place.
register_sections_populate_hint: Pre-populate your vault with a standard set of sections.
register_subtitle: Create a new choir or ensemble on Polyphony
register_terms: By registering, you agree to our terms of service
success_next_steps_1: Visit your organization's site at the URL above
success_next_steps_2: Log in with the email you registered with
success_next_steps_3: Start inviting members and uploading scores
success_org_created: Your organization has been successfully registered on Polyphony.
success_ssl_notice: It may take a few minutes for the URL to become active while the SSL certificate is provisioned.
